message:
Add PID file management module with 24 comprehensive tests

New pidfile module provides:
- PID file creation with automatic parent directory creation
- Stale PID detection and cleanup
- Process liveness checking (Unix: kill -0)
- Automatic file cleanup on drop
- Persistent mode option for testing
- Unix file permissions (0644)
- Duplicate instance prevention (AlreadyRunning error)
- Crash recovery (replaces stale PID files)

Tests cover all acceptance criteria:
- File creation with correct permissions
- PID content validation
- Stale file detection and handling
- Clean shutdown removal
- Crash recovery scenarios
- Race condition prevention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
